title: GitHub Actions Execution Model, Contexts, and State Boundaries · Workflow Trust Lens: Ci Workspace Output Artifact Cache State
summary: A team confuses workflow, run, job, step, action, runner, shell, workspace, environment file, output, artifact, and cache state while debugging a missing build result. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci workspace output artifact cache state increment in workflow execution and state trace. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify workspace files, step outputs, job outputs, environment files, artifacts, caches, summaries, logs, and external releases by scope and lifetime.
Distinguish server-side contexts and expression evaluation from runner-side environment expansion, shell parsing, and process state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-workspace-output-artifact-cache-state — Classify workspace files, step outputs, job outputs, environment files, artifacts, caches, summaries, logs, and external releases by scope and lifetime.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-gha-execution-model-contexts-3
  - competency: ci-worked-gha-execution-model-contexts-3
    artifact: execution-trace.yaml
    decision: worked gha execution model contexts 3
    environment: Node 24 TypeScript monorepo with three lockfiles
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked3
    change: |
      event: pull_request
      workflow-ref: owner/repo/.github/workflows/ci.yml@refs/pull/42/merge
      run-id: 8842
      run-attempt: 2
      job-runner: fresh-ubuntu-24.04
      step-process: isolated-shell
      state-handoff: validated-job-output
      retained-artifact: test-report-digest
    verify: compare event payload workflow ref workflow sha run id attempt runner and artifact metadata
    failure: Reject shared-runner assumptions, branch-only identity, or cache and artifact state treated as equivalent.
    repair: Trace server and runner evaluation, name each state lifetime, and retain exact run and artifact identity.
content.caption: Runnable CI/CD workflow, artifact, release, and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
